languages.text: "Прекрасная идея, сенешаль. Пусть Погонщиц заманивают на пристреленные с орбиты позиции и уничтожат их лансами".
"An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."
languages.original_text: "Прекрасная идея, сенешаль. Пусть Погонщиц заманивают на пристреленные с орбиты позиции и уничтожат их лансами".

traits.locale_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."
"An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."
"An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."

languages.text: 「いい考えだね、執事。放牧民を軌道上から攻撃できる位置に誘い込み、ランス砲で撃破しよう」
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."

traits.locale_text: 「いい考えだね、執事。放牧民を軌道上から攻撃できる位置に誘い込み、ランス砲で撃破しよう」

languages.text: «Una idea excelente, Senescal. Que atraigan a los Pastores a posiciones que podamos bombardear desde la órbita y los destruiremos con nuestra batería de lanzas».
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."

traits.locale_text: «Una idea excelente, Senescal. Que atraigan a los Pastores a posiciones que podamos bombardear desde la órbita y los destruiremos con nuestra batería de lanzas».

languages.text: “好主意，总领。将拒生花诱至轨道火力可覆盖的地点，再用光矛彻底歼灭。”
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."

traits.locale_text: “好主意，总领。将拒生花诱至轨道火力可覆盖的地点，再用光矛彻底歼灭。”

languages.text: "Eine ausgezeichnete Idee, Truchsess. Wir locken die Treiber zu Positionen, die aus dem Orbit beschossen werden können und vernichten sie mit unserer Lanzenbatterie."
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."

traits.locale_text: "Eine ausgezeichnete Idee, Truchsess. Wir locken die Treiber zu Positionen, die aus dem Orbit beschossen werden können und vernichten sie mit unserer Lanzenbatterie."

languages.text: "Mükemmel bir fikir Seneşal. Çobanları yörüngeden ateş edilebilecek konumlara çektirin ve mızrak bataryamızla yok edin."
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."

traits.locale_text: "Mükemmel bir fikir Seneşal. Çobanları yörüngeden ateş edilebilecek konumlara çektirin ve mızrak bataryamızla yok edin."

languages.text: « Excellente idée, sénéchal. Attirons les Chasseurs là où notre batterie de lances pourra les anéantir depuis l'espace. »
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."

traits.locale_text: « Excellente idée, sénéchal. Attirons les Chasseurs là où notre batterie de lances pourra les anéantir depuis l'espace. »
